prompt: Subject: Night-colored beads. Character: 2-D iron bead/Perler bead style flat art of a woman in her 20s. Long black hair with see-through bangs, Japanese-style makeup, and a soft, mature expression. Clothing: white ribbed camisole-style loungewear with white shorts. Pose: Sitting with knees to the side, hands folded. Texture: High-density iron bead craft art with visible round holes. Square flat-lay composition from directly above. Warm beige tones with soft lighting and small shadows in the bead holes.
